title: Magnetic Tool
description: Adds one item - a Magnet. You can use it to attract any objects, but the more objects you attract, the weaker the attraction becomes
body:
Magnetic Tool is a practical utility mod that adds a powerful magnet to Minecraft, designed to streamline your item collection experience.

🔧 **Core Features:**
• **Magnetic Attraction**: Automatically attracts items within an 8-block radius
• **Smart Mechanics**: Larger item stacks move slower, maintaining game balance
• **Dual-Hand Support**: Works in both main hand and off-hand
• **Optimized Performance**: Efficient item detection and movement calculations

⚡ **How It Works:**
The magnet uses advanced physics calculations to create realistic magnetic attraction. Items closer to the player are pulled with greater force, while larger stacks experience increased resistance, preventing overpowered item collection.

🎯 **Perfect For:**
• Mining expeditions where you need to collect scattered resources
• Farming operations requiring efficient crop collection
• Combat scenarios where you want to gather drops quickly
• Any situation where manual item pickup becomes tedious

⚒️ **Crafting Recipe:**
Create your magnet using iron ingots, redstone, lapis lazuli, and a lodestone - a recipe that feels both balanced and thematic.

Whether you're a casual player looking to reduce tedious item collection or a hardcore player optimizing your workflow, Magnetic Tool provides a quality-of-life improvement that feels natural and balanced within the Minecraft experience.
